titleStmt.title: SII 20.220: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 220. (B.K. No. 81 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the temple of Sōmeśvara.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 12, Pramōdūta, Jyēshṭha, śu. 5, Monday, Saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1270, May 26, Monday.

This inscription records a remission of certain taxes for the benefit of the temple of Svayaṁbhu Sōmanātha of Kalukere and for the feeding of the ascetics, by Sitāḻa Māyidēva, the officer of taxes, at the instance of Sarvādhikāri Viṭṭarasa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārā
yaṇaṁ bhujabaḻapratāpacakra
varti śrī vīramahādēvarājyōdaya
da 12 neya pramādōca saṁvatsara
da jēṣṭa su 5 sōmavāra saṁkramāṇadaṁ
du śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sa
rvvādhikāri viṭṭarasara nirūpadiṁ suṁ
kādhikāri sitāḻa māyidēva ka
lukeṟeya śrī svayaṁbhu sōmanā
thadēvara naivēdyakaṁ tapōdhanara yāhā
radānakaṁ biṭṭa yattu 20 yaḍake
meṇasu mukṣavāgi yēna hēṟidaḍaṁ suṁ
ka sarvvamānya yiṁtī dharmmamaṁ staḻada ga
vuḍu samasta praje stāna mānya muṁmu
ridaṁḍaṁgaḻuṁ pratipāḻusuva
ru maṁgaḻamahā śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 20.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
